title: Implement Request Aggregation & Composition
description: Design API gateways to aggregate data from multiple microservices into a single response. Implement request composition to reduce client-side round-trips and 'Waterfall' latency. Optimize data retrieval patterns at the gateway level for improved client performance.
objectives: Design API gateways to aggregate data from multiple microservices into a single response.
Implement request composition to reduce client-side round-trips and 'Waterfall' latency.
Optimize data retrieval patterns at the gateway level for improved client performance.
